title: Clean up and phase-track roadmap file maintenance
notes: Created from human suggestion #23 (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-29). Several roadmap files have become messy as new developments were integrated, with the first progress-report roadmaps as an immediate example but the problem applying more generally across docs/roadmap. Scope: systematically audit and tidy roadmap files; for each roadmap, distinguish completed work, current work, and planned future work; add relevant links to issues, related roadmaps, platform views, and code where useful; avoid overlong historical accretion that obscures current priorities; and track cleanup progress in docs/roadmap/roadmap-cleanup.md by repeatable phases. Priority is P2 because this is important repository/process hygiene that supports AI context management and publication work, but it is not a blocking production defect.
